message:
fix(onboard): Use getActiveBullets for consistent filtering

- Import and use getActiveBullets from playbook.ts instead of inline
  filter that was missing maturity !== "deprecated" check
- Also fixes doctor.ts output message typo
- Includes why.ts output formatting improvements
